# terrible_community_vmware_vmware_vm_info (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `folder` (String) Specify a folder location of VMs to gather information from. Examples:    folder: /ha-datacenter/vm    folder: ha-datacenter/vm    folder: /datacenter1/vm    folder: datacenter1/vm    folder: /datacenter1/vm/folder1    folder: datacenter1/vm/folder1    folder: /folder1/datacenter1/vm    folder: folder1/datacenter1/vm    folder: /folder1/datacenter1/vm/folder2
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `show_allocated` (Boolean) Allocated storage in byte and memory in MB are shown if it set to True.
- `show_attribute` (Boolean) Attributes related to VM guest shown in information only when this is set `true`.
- `show_cluster` (Boolean) Tags virtual machine's cluster is shown if set to `true`.
- `show_datacenter` (Boolean) Tags virtual machine's datacenter is shown if set to `true`.
- `show_datastore` (Boolean) Tags virtual machine's datastore is shown if set to `true`.
- `show_esxi_hostname` (Boolean) Tags virtual machine's ESXi host is shown if set to `true`.
- `show_folder` (Boolean) Show folders
- `show_mac_address` (Boolean) Tags virtual machine's mac address is shown if set to `true`.
- `show_net` (Boolean) Tags virtual machine's network is shown if set to `true`.
- `show_resource_pool` (Boolean) Tags virtual machine's resource pool is shown if set to `true`.
- `show_tag` (Boolean) Tags related to virtual machine are shown if set to `true`.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `vm_name` (String) Name of the virtual machine to get related configurations information from.
- `vm_type` (String) If set to `vm`, then information are gathered for virtual machines only. If set to `template`, then information are gathered for virtual machine templates only. If set to `all`, then information are gathered for all virtual machines and virtual machine templates.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `virtual_machines` (String) list of dictionary of virtual machines and their information
